title: VWB Nextflow Test Pipeline Parameters
description: Schema for VWB Nextflow test pipeline

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to input file or directory.
input.help_text: Path to a GCS bucket path or local file.

outdir.description: Path to output directory where results will be published.
outdir.help_text: Must be a valid GCS bucket path (gs://).

input_text.description: A simple text message to include in the output.
input_text.help_text: Optional message string passed to the SAY_HELLO process.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs to use per task.
max_cpus.help_text: Applies to all processes unless overridden.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory to use per task.

debug_mode.description: Enable debug mode for verbose logging.
debug_mode.help_text: When true, pipeline outputs additional debug information.

sample_ids.description: List of sample IDs to process.
sample_ids.help_text: Provide as a JSON array e.g. ["sample1", "sample2"]
